headers.User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 18_2_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/18.2 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1

js.home: const cate=env.get("category");const page=env.get("page");const url=`${env.baseUrl}/index.php/vod/type/id/${cate}/page/${page}.html`;try{const html=await req(url,{headers:{"User-Agent":"Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 18_2_1 like Mac OS X)AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/18.2 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1"}});const $=kitty.load(html);const movies=[];$('.post-list .col-md-3').each((_,element)=>{const videoItem=$(element).find('.video-item');const entryTitle=$(element).find('.entry-title');const vodUrl=entryTitle.find('a').attr('href');const vodPic=videoItem.find('.featured-content-image a img').attr('data-original');const vodName=entryTitle.find('a').text().trim();const remark=videoItem.find('span.model-view-left').text().trim();const duration=videoItem.find('span.model-view').text().trim();const fullText=entryTitle.text().trim();const pubdate=fullText.replace(vodName,'').trim();if(vodUrl&&vodName){movies.push({id:vodUrl,cover:vodPic?vodPic:"",title:vodName,remark:remark})}});return movies}catch(e){return[]}
js.search: const keyword=env.get("keyword");const page=env.get("page");const encodedKeyword=encodeURIComponent(keyword);const url=`${env.baseUrl}/index.php/vod/search/page/${page}/wd/${encodedKeyword}.html`;try{const html=await req(url,{headers:{"User-Agent":"Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 18_2_1 like Mac OS X)AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/18.2 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1"}});const $=kitty.load(html);const movies=[];$('.post-list .col-md-3').each((_,element)=>{const videoItem=$(element).find('.video-item');const entryTitle=$(element).find('.entry-title');const vodUrl=entryTitle.find('a').attr('href');const vodPic=videoItem.find('.featured-content-image a img').attr('data-original');const vodName=entryTitle.find('a').text().trim();const remark=videoItem.find('span.model-view-left').text().trim();const duration=videoItem.find('span.model-view').text().trim();const fullText=entryTitle.text().trim();const pubdate=fullText.replace(vodName,'').trim();if(vodUrl&&vodName){movies.push({id:vodUrl,cover:vodPic?vodPic:"",title:vodName,remark:remark})}});return movies}catch(e){return[]}

name: 3Q影视
desc: 解析 qqqys.com 分类、详情与搜索，支持两种播放列表

js.home: const cate=env.get('category')'电影';const page=Number(env.get('page')||1);const limit=24;const BASE=env.baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/,'');const url=`${BASE}/api.php/filter/vod?type_name=${encodeURIComponent(cate)}&sort=hits&page=${page}&limit=${limit}`;const res=await req(url,{headers:{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}});const data=typeof res==='string'?JSON.parse(res):(res&&res.content?JSON.parse(res.content):{});const items=[];(data.data[]).forEach(v=>{const remark=[v.vod_year,v.vod_area,v.vod_class].filter(Boolean).join(' / ');items.push({id:${BASE}/vd/${v.vod_id}.html,title:v.vod_name,cover:v.vod_pic,remark});});return items;
js.detail: const url=env.get('movieId');const res=await req(url,{headers:{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}});const html=typeof res==='string'?res:(res&&res.content?res.content:'');const $=kitty.load(html);const title=$('h1').text().trim()'';const cover=$('.lazyload').attr('src')'';const desc=$('.line-clamp-5 p').text().trim()'';const idMatch=url.match(/vd\/(\d+)\.html/);const vodId=idMatch?idMatch[1]:'';let playlist=[];if(vodId){/* 第一种方式：API JSON */const api=`${env.baseUrl}/api.php/internal/search_aggregate?vod_id=${vodId}`;const res2=await req(api,{headers:{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}});const data2=typeof res2==='string'?JSON.parse(res2):(res2&&res2.content?JSON.parse(res2.content):{});(data2.data[]).forEach(site=>{const videos=[];(site.vod_play_url||'').split('#').forEach(seg=>{const parts=seg.split('$');if(parts.length===2){videos.push({text:parts[0],id:parts[1],type:'m3u8'});}});if(videos.length)playlist.push({title:site.site_name,videos});});/* 第二种方式：PLAYLIST_DATA */const playMatch=html.match(/window.PLAYLIST_DATA\s*=\s*(\{.*?\})/s);if(playMatch){try{const playData=JSON.parse(playMatch[1]);Object.values(playData).forEach(group=>{const from=group.from;const show=group.player_info.show||from;const videos=[];Object.values(group.urls||{}).forEach(u=>{const nid=u.nid;const name=u.name||('第'+nid+'集');const playUrl=${url}+#sid=${from}&nid=${nid};videos.push({text:name,id:playUrl,type:'m3u8'});});if(videos.length)playlist.push({title:show,videos});});}catch(e){}}}return{id:url,title,cover,desc,playlist};
js.search: const keyword=env.get('keyword')'';const page=Number(env.get('page')||1);const BASE=env.baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/,'');if(!keyword)return[];const url=`${BASE}/vodsearch/${encodeURIComponent(keyword)}--/page/${page}.html`;const res=await req(url,{headers:{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}});const html=typeof res==='string'?res:(res&&res.content?res.content:'');const $=kitty.load(html);const items=[];$('.ml-[105px]').each((i,el)=>{const title=$(el).find('strong').text().trim();const remark=$(el).find('.flex .truncate').first().text().trim();const actor=$(el).find('.flex .truncate').eq(1).text().trim();const cover=$(el).find('img.lazy').attr('data-original')'';const id=$(el).find('a[href*="/vd/"]').attr('href');if(title&&id){items.push({id:${BASE}${id},title,cover,remark,actor});}});return items;

name: 🎨肉肉漫画
desc: Roum26 小说分类、搜索、详情、播放列表
